parameters.command:
=FFMPEG="${FFMPEG_PATH:-ffmpeg}"
INPUT="{{ $json.outputFile }}"
OUTPUT="{{ $json.outputFile.replace('.mp4', '_v.mp4') }}"
DUR={{ $json.duracaoSegundos }}

# Verificar orientação do vídeo gerado
WIDTH=$("$FFMPEG" -i "$INPUT" 2>&1 | grep 'Video:' | grep -oP '\d+x\d+' | head -1 | cut -dx -f1)
HEIGHT=$("$FFMPEG" -i "$INPUT" 2>&1 | grep 'Video:' | grep -oP '\d+x\d+' | head -1 | cut -dx -f2)

if [ "$WIDTH" -gt "$HEIGHT" ]; then
  # Landscape → crop para 9:16
  "$FFMPEG" -y -i "$INPUT" \
    -vf "crop=ih*9/16:ih,scale=1080:1920,setsar=1,fps=24" \
    -c:v libx264 -preset fast -crf 20 -pix_fmt yuv420p \
    -t $DUR -an "$OUTPUT"
else
  # Já vertical → normalizar
  "$FFMPEG" -y -i "$INPUT" \
    -vf "scale=1080:1920:force_original_aspect_ratio=decrease,pad=1080:1920:(ow-iw)/2:(oh-ih)/2:color=black,setsar=1,fps=24" \
    -c:v libx264 -preset fast -crf 20 -pix_fmt yuv420p \
    -t $DUR -an "$OUTPUT"
fi

echo "PROCESSED:$OUTPUT"
